rows.label: qev040802_MSG0001
rows.name: ...Could you... possibly be... [ST:playername ]... -mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0002
rows.name:
I don't know what kind of
coincidence this is... but you
came at a super great time-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please-mo... Put some food, anything
is fine, into Muimui's mouth-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0004
rows.name:
What is this-mo? Something like this won't
fill my stomach at all-mo. Are you making a
fool out of Muimui by giving me this-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0005
rows.name:
...I know-mo! I want Cosse Beans
and Fullbelly Geckos-mo. Please,
go get them quickly-mo, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even so, it was disgusting
bread, but I somehow managed
to move my hands again-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0007
rows.name:
While you go get the Cosse Beans and
Fullbelly Geckos, Muimui will dig up the
Sword of Legendaryness buried here-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0008
rows.name:
So I want you to go get the food quickly-mo.
I'll give you as much money as you want once I
get the Sword of Legendaryness, so please-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0009
rows.name:
*Sniff, sniff*... That smells good-mo...
Did you perhaps bring food-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ooh, senior!! Wonderful-mo!
Food-mo! Food!! -mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0012
rows.name:
Put my hands together-mo!!
Thank you for the meal-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0013
rows.name:
*Momo-gogo-momo-fun* *Gomomo-gomogomo-mogogogogo*!
*Mogomogo*... *gulp*, phew![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0014
rows.name: ...I'm full-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, the Legen-dar had such a huge reaction
that I got completely absorbed in it... and ended
up searching while forgetting about food-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040802_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if he found the
Sword of Legendaryness.

rows.label: qev040802_JNK0020
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev040802_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that Moimoi was worried.

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0016
rows.name:
I found it earlier-mo! But... what
was here was a legend, alright...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0017
rows.name:
But it was a legendary... earwax remover-mo. It
seems because it's a relic of the same ancestor,
it emitted an identical legendary radio wave-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0018
rows.name:
I did a bad thing to him-mo. I'll
bring these leftover Cosse Beans
as a souvenir for him-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ah... and I suppose I'll bring
the legendary earwax remover I
found here too, just in case-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0020
rows.name:
It seems because it's a relic of the same
ancestor as the Sword of Legendaryness, it
emitted an identical legendary radio wave-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0021
rows.name:
In the end, it was a failure this
time too, but... it's not like
there were zero results-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0022
rows.name:
Because this intense radio wave is gone,
I was able to catch another legendary radio
wave in the White Tree Continent-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0023
rows.name:
Next time, I will definitely get
the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Which is why, I'm going home-mo!
I have to quickly show Moimoi
that his Brother is safe-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0025
rows.name:
Scraping with the legendary earwax remover
feels incredibly good-mo! As expected of a
legendary item from our ancestors-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040802_MSG0026
rows.name:
Next time... in the White Tree
Continent, I will abso-lute-ly
find the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]
